method: v-jepa2 frozen encoder + learned latent dynamics + reward + CEM-MPC
objective: plan against learned latent reward head (not goal-distance)
training: encoder FROZEN (internet-video pretrained); only the latent dynamics + reward heads are trained on this task
caveat: natural-video pretraining -> simulated renders are OOD; measures whether frozen V-JEPA features support a planmable world model here
